item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-045","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant plainly stated it lacked the Q3 revenue source/access and asked the user to provide reports, tables, screenshots, or definitions. It did not use a Mindthus-style method wrapper or substitute a judgment framework for data acquisition. The extra notes about possible breakdowns and confirming revenue recognition are practical follow-up context, not over-methodization."}
